violations.text: The liquid waste from the espresso unit is draining into a 5-gallon container. Condensate drainage and other nonsewage liquids must drain into a drain. Establishment is to work with facilities to find solution for the conveyance of liquid waste to a proper drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
